keyRules: A maximum of 120 m above the ground (EASA Open Category)
Mandatory A1/A3 online training — minimum age 14 (registration must be completed by a parent or guardian for minors aged 14 and 15).
Mandatory liability insurance (policy number required at check-in)
The CTR for Luxembourg-Findel Airport covers a significant portion of the country
Always keep the drone within visual line of sight (VLOS)
Do not fly over assemblies of people. Rules for uninvolved persons depend on subcategory, class mark and operating conditions; check the official matrix.
Comply with the Luxembourg-Findel CTR and the UAS geographic zones published on Geoportail.lu — there is no longer a flat 5-km buffer zone following the EASA harmonization
At night, many areas (particularly around Findel) require a specific permit—check the requirements for each area at drones.geoportail.lu.
Grand Ducal Palace, correctional facilities, and military zones: prior authorization required — local stadiums and airfields (Useldange, Noertrange): flying prohibited.
importantNotes: Mandatory insurance; policy number required at check-in
The CTR for Luxembourg-Findel Airport covers a large part of this small country
The new national framework (December 2025) provides for criminal penalties—up to 1 year in prison and a €5,000 fine—for failure to obtain insurance or register.
The GDPR applies when capturing identifiable images

fields.disclaimerText: Always check the official sources from the DAC and Geoportail.lu before flying. This app is a tool—not a legal source. Luxembourg applies EASA regulations with additional national requirements.
